backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user profiles, blood groups, emergency requests, and backend functions for registration, donor search, emergency requests, and dashboard data with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (registration, donor search, SOS button, eligibility checker) to their frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and utility in one sentence.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS with OKLCH CSS custom properties defining light and dark theme color tokens for the app's design system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Blood Connect' that mounts the React app into a root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all app routes (home, register, search, eligibility, dashboard, admin) and triggers a profile setup modal for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminEmergencyRe: Admin table component that displays all emergency requests in reverse-chronological order with blood group, requester name, city, and formatted timestamp.
frontend/src/components/AdminUserTable.t: Paginated admin user table showing user details with active/inactive status and a deactivation button; notes a backend gap preventing principal-based deactivation.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStats.t: Displays a two-card grid showing total registered donors count and a static 'Lives Saved' stat using icons from lucide-react.
Renders a card for a single donor result showing blood group, name, city, last active time, and call/WhatsApp contact buttons.
A form component with blood group select and city input fields that validates inputs and triggers a donor search callback on submission.
frontend/src/components/EligibilityQuest: A multi-step questionnaire (age, weight, last donation, health conditions) that evaluates and displays blood donation eligibility results.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a sticky header, bottom navigation bar linking to all routes, and an Outlet for rendering child pages.
frontend/src/components/NearbyDonorsList: Renders a list of DonorResultCard components for donors in a given city, with an empty-state message if none are found.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects new user profile details (name, role, blood group, phone, city, age) and submits them via the registerUser mutation.
frontend/src/components/RecentRequestsLi: Displays a list of recent emergency blood requests showing blood group, requester name, city, and timestamp with an urgent badge.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationForm: A React form component for registering users as donors or receivers, collecting name, blood group, phone, city, age, and last donation date, then submitting via the useRegisterUser mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SOSButton.tsx: A pulsing SOS button component that triggers an emergency blood request dialog, using the caller's profile data to broadcast an urgent request via the useCreateEmergencyRequest mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, registration, donor search, emergency requests, dashboard data, and admin panel data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a medical red/white color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes, plus utility animations like SOS pulse.
frontend/src/lib/bloodGroup.ts: Utility module providing blood group label mappings, formatting helpers, and time-related utilities (timeAgo, isAvailableNow) for displaying donor activity.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that fetches and displays user and emergency request data in tables with summary stats, handling loading/error states including unauthorized access.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing donor stats, nearby donors, and recent requests for authenticated users, with redirects for unauthenticated or unregistered users.
frontend/src/pages/DonorSearchPage.tsx: Donor search page with a form to search by blood group and city, displaying results as donor cards or an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/EligibilityPage.tsx: Static eligibility checker page that renders the EligibilityQuestionnaire component with a brief explanation of how it works.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page with a welcome banner, login/logout, SOS emergency button, and quick-action links to search, eligibility, and dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page wrapping the RegistrationForm component, navigating back to home on success.
frontend/src/utils/eligibilityChecker.ts: Utility that evaluates blood donation eligibility based on age, weight, health conditions, and last donation date, returning a result with reason and next eligible date.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Blood Connect frontend, defining dark mode, custom colors using oklch CSS variables, typography, container sizes fixed at 430px, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for Blood Connect, documenting version, architectural notes, existing implemented features (registration, donor search, SOS, AI eligibility checker, etc.), known issues, and image requirements.
